content.full_text:
December 28, 1989

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, California 95814

SUBJECT: Ch. 403, Stats 1989

We request your informal legal opinion on this question:

The investment of District funds is made by or under the direct supervision of the District's Finance Manager. This officer is a designated employee who files an annual disclosure statement under the District's approved Conflict of Interest Code. Does the filing of such a statement satisfy the requirement of disclosure made upon "public officials who manage public investments" as contained in the amendment to Section 87200 of the Government Code made by Ch. 403, Stats 1989 (AB 941, Lempert)?

Your assistance will be appreciated.

Faithfully,

Albert Thomas Henley
General Counsel

cc: Charles G. Wilson
    Finance Manager, SCVWD
